inscription: Isla Caldton the 6th is recorded among the dead of Marara.

name: Remembrance Shrine of Bram Ingbrook
inscription: Bram Ingbrook's name was set down for those who came after.

name: Household Shrine of Piera Holborn the 23rd
inscription: Piera Holborn the 23rd is recorded among the dead of Peldun.

name: Household Shrine of Petra Dorstone
inscription: Petra Dorstone's kin kept this memory.

name: Remembrance Shrine of Ysolt Quilwold
inscription: Ysolt Quilwold's kin kept this memory.
